title: Content Schemas
description: Designing JSON schemas for articles, categories, offers, and pages that machines and humans can both navigate.
intro: A content schema is a contract between your content and the systems that render it. When the schema is consistent, AI tools can edit content safely, templates stay thin, and automation works without special-casing. This section covers how to design schemas that hold up as your content library grows.

seo.title: Content Schemas ... Content Systems ... Krisada.com
seo.description: How to design JSON schemas for articles, categories, and pages that scale cleanly and support automation.
